name: foundry-tenant-ui-web-template
description: Canonical Foundry tenant app-UI template. The Foundry orchestrator forks this into the customer's designated git repo on foundry creation, substitutes the markers below, and hands it over — the customer owns + edits it. All heavy logic (auth, UI kit, tenant API client) comes from the @startsimpli/* npm packages, so it works the moment it's forked.

substitutions.__FOUNDRY_SLUG__: tenant slug — also the central-auth ?app= tag and NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_SLUG
substitutions.__FOUNDRY_TAGLINE__: one-line app tagline for the home
